[@microsoft/fast-element/declarative.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [TemplateElement](../fast-element.templateelement/index.html)

## TemplateElement class

The <f-template> custom element that will provide view logic to the element.

Acts as the bridge between declarative HTML templates and the FAST element registry. Lifecycle orchestration (registration, options, callbacks) lives here; template parsing is delegated to [TemplateParser](../fast-element.templateparser/)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare class TemplateElement extends FASTElement 
```
**Extends:** FASTElement
